title: Forest Carbon Stock Changes 2023
summary: Updated calculations for Guyana's carbon credit monitoring based on 2023 deforestation rates.
author: Guyana Forestry Commission

sections.title: LCDS Context
sections.body: Guyana's Low Carbon Development Strategy (LCDS) 2030 relies on accurate monitoring of forest carbon stocks. This report summarizes the annual verification results.

sections.title: Deforestation Rate
sections.body: The national deforestation rate remains below 0.05%, one of the lowest globally. Mining remains the primary driver, though rehabilitation efforts have increased.
